steps.t: Calenglad is at the Ranger-camp on the island of Tinnudir. Fainneleg heard some news from Calenglad that renewed his hope and has sent you to the old …
Calenglad is at the Ranger-camp on the island of Tinnudir. You and a contingent of Rangers have captured Mordrambor, one of the Black Númenórean sorce…
